steps.title: Use the follow-up evidence
steps.content: The evidence says recent oil shocks had an effect on India's GDP that was only slightly greater than zero. That means the relationship between oil shocks and national economic activity has become weaker as non-oil energy use has increased.

steps.title: Test the word meanings
steps.content: A means returned to a previous state, B means submitted, and C means fluctuated. The needed word means diminished or became less intense, which matches a relationship that has shrunk to almost no effect. The answer is D.
